subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Thee, O my God, for having strengthened me to recognize the Dayspring of Thy Revelation and the Source of Thy knowledge, and for having given me to drink of the wine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهی بما ایدتنی علی عرفان مشرق وحیک و مطلع عرفانک و سقیتنی خمر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @prayer for women, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
